---
title: "Powerlifter EDA"
author: "smd"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
setwd("~/GitHub/powerlifting_eda")
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(broom)

df <- read_csv("lifters.zip")
```


```{r}
lifters <- df %>% 
  mutate(year = year(date)) %>% 
  filter(year >= 2000) %>% 
  mutate(half_decade = (year %/% 5) * 5) %>% 
  mutate(decade = (year %/% 10) * 10) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(best3squat_kg) & !is.na(best3bench_kg) & !is.na(best3deadlift_kg))
```

# Preliminaries

```{r}
lifters %>% 
  ggplot(aes(year)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Number of lifts over time"
  )
```

Let's start by seeing how the total weight lifted has chaned over time

```{r}
lifters %>% 
  ggplot(aes(as_factor(half_decade), total_kg)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Half Decade",
    y = "Total Lifted (kg)",
    title = "Have lifters gotten stronger with time?"
  )
  
```

Maybe... lets do a regression and see?

```{r}
mdl <- lm(lifters$total_kg ~ lifters$year)

tidy(mdl)

```



```{r}
lifters %>% 
  ggplot(aes(as_factor(half_decade), bodyweight_kg)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Half Decade",
    y = "Body Weight (kg)",
    title = "Have lifters gotten heavier with time?"
  )
  
```


```{r}
lifters %>% 
  filter(between(year, 2015, 2023)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(bodyweight_kg, total_kg)) + 
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ year) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10()
```
```{r}
mdl_squat <- lm( log10(lifters$bodyweight_kg) ~ log10(lifters$best3squat_kg) + 0)

mdl_bench <- lm( log10(lifters$bodyweight_kg) ~ log10(lifters$best3bench_kg) + 0)

mdl_deadlift <- lm( log10(lifters$bodyweight_kg) ~ log10(lifters$best3deadlift_kg) + 0)

mdl_total <- lm( log10(lifters$bodyweight_kg) ~ log10(lifters$total_kg) + 0)
```

```{r}
summary(mdl_deadlift)

```


```{r}
lifters %>% 
  ggplot(aes(as_factor(year), log10(total_kg))) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
```


```{r}
lifters %>% 
  filter(age >= 18) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(as_factor(year), log10(bodyweight_kg))) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
```


```{r}
lifters %>% 
  ggplot(aes(as_factor(year), age)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
```

filter lifters

```{r}
lifters %>% 
  ggplot(aes(log10(age), total_kg)) + 
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
```
